MAS1.descr: Donec sed pharetra est, eu dictum turpis. Quisque cursus vulputate pellentesque.
MAS1.highlight: Get your sweet tooth ready and join us in decorating your very own gingerbread house with all the trimmings. A great treat for now or take away for you to enjoy.
MAS1.fulldescription: Please book by number of chairs you will be requiring and inform the team how many kits you would like upon arrival. We ask you to limit the extra number of guests attending if they will not be participating in building a gingerbread house. This is to allow for those who would like to build a house. Children 16 years and under must be accompanied by an adult guardian that is over 18 years old. A signed waiver is required to participate

MAS2.descr: Donec sed pharetra est, eu dictum turpis. Quisque cursus vulputate pellentesque.
MAS2.highlight: Enjoy the best of both worlds and adventure on this Bike and Hike experience to Sundance Canyon. We will take you on this beautiful scenic route as you learn about local Banff history and amaze in classic Banff views.
MAS2.fulldescription:
• 4 Guests per experience - additional fees apply for more guests.
  • Bike 6.1km each way with 100M of elevation gain to the Canyon.
  • Hike: 1.6km round trip (moderate level). Height requirements for bikes - 5''2.
  • Tour is recommended for 12+ in age.
  • Tour runs in all weather. Weather cancellations is up to the discrepancy of the guide, day of. Please dress according to the weather in active gear.
bring: Extra cash for photos and souvenirs

MAS3.descr: Donec sed pharetra est, eu dictum turpis. Quisque cursus vulputate pellentesque.
MAS3.highlight: Enjoy some time under the stars or the company of your friends around one of our signature Campfires. Let our team take care of everything!
MAS3.fulldescription:
• Enjoy some time under the stars or the company of your friends around one of our signature Campfires. Let our team take care of everything!
  • This campfire experience is located on our unique Upper Terrace with the ""Million Dollar View"". Our host will manage the fire for you, and ensure you are cozy with blankets and service from our Rundle Lounge.
  • 6 guests per Campfire. Please book a second campfire spot if you have more attendees.
bring: Extra cash for photos and souvenirs
